news.headline: Inside the Supply Line Delivering American Guns to Mexican Cartels
news.summary: A surge of weapons is flowing from the U.S. to Mexico. These firearms — sourced from gun shops, shows, websites and apps — are funneled across the border to fuel the country’s most violent crimes.

news.headline: The RBA has made one of its most controversial calls in recent years - and this rate rise may not age well

news.headline: Woman who wrote book on grief guilty of murdering husband
news.summary: A woman who wrote a children’s book on handling grief after her husband's death, has been found guilty of murdering him.

news.headline: Malaysian mother furious after school punishes bullied son with caning, weeding
news.summary:
Not only was he punched repeatedly by a peer, a Malaysian student at a secondary school in Kuching, Sarawak, was caned and forced to write a note admitting his mistake, China Press reported.
Angered at how the case was handled, the boy’s mother shared the incident on social media and lodged a police

news.headline: Nigeria’s first state visit since 1989: President Bola Tinubu heads to UK
news.summary: British pomp and pageantry await the Nigerian leader, but some in the diaspora are sceptical about his trip.

news.headline: Families search for loved ones after deadly Pakistan strikes on Kabul rehab
news.summary: Afghan authorities say a Pakistani attack has killed hundreds of civilians; Islamabad rejects the claim as 'false'.
